src: A metallic corkscrew with a black handle, featuring a bottle opener on one end and a foldable twisting spiral. The tool is compact and sleek with a small skull design near the hinge.
edit: A fancy corkscrew with a two-colored metallic and marble-design handle, having a decorative end with intricate patterns. The spiral showcases gold accents, featuring a luxurious design.

per_image_non_shared_src.0: The object lies flat on a grey tiled floor, near a corner with a signboard. The corner has light-colored walls, suggesting an indoor office environment.
per_image_non_shared_src.1: The object rests on a soft, grey fabric-covered surface near a window. The room has light streaming in from the window, creating a calm indoor setting.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: The object is placed near the edge of a plant pot with soil and a succulent. Surrounding the pot are boxes and papers, indicating an inside garden or office space.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: The object stands propped against a kitchen countertop edge, with a shiny metallic sink adjoining a speckled black and grey counter surface.
per_image_non_shared_src.4: The object is on a brown, worn-out tabletop. The surface has visible scratches and marks, indicating a frequently used indoor area.
per_image_non_shared_src.5: The object is balanced atop a white appliance with a digital display. Nearby are documents and other small items, hinting at an office or kitchen setup.
per_image_non_shared_src.6: The object rests on a grey, soft fabric with gentle folds. The simplicity of the background suggests it's placed on bedding or a similar textile surface.

per_image_non_shared_edit.0: The object lies flat on icy, textured ground, resembling a corner with snowy signs. The area has light-colored icy walls, suggesting an outdoor winter scene.
per_image_non_shared_edit.1: The object rests on a soft, snowy surface near a frosted window. The room is bathed in winter light streaming in from the icy window, creating a serene icy ambiance.
per_image_non_shared_edit.2: The object is placed near the edge of a snowy plant pot, with snow-dusted soil and a frosty succulent. Surrounding the pot are icy boxes and frost-covered papers.
per_image_non_shared_edit.3: The object stands propped against a winter-themed countertop edge, with a frosty metallic sink adjoining a speckled ice and snow-covered counter surface.
per_image_non_shared_edit.4: The object is on an icy, frosty tabletop. The surface displays visible icy patterns, suggesting a frozen indoor area during winter.
per_image_non_shared_edit.5: The object is balanced atop a snow-dusted white appliance with a digital display covered in frost. Nearby are snow-sprinkled documents, hinting at a winter-themed office or kitchen setup.
per_image_non_shared_edit.6: The object rests on a soft, snow-like fabric with gentle icy folds. Simplicity of the snowy background suggests it's placed on wintry bedding or similar textile.
